name: RAG Evaluation
description: Evaluate a retrieval-augmented generation system with dataset, retrieval, answer quality, citation, reliability, and reporting evidence.

inputs.description: RAG system, prompt, pipeline config, or application endpoint description.
Evaluation dataset, question set, references, or annotation source.
Corpus, index, document snapshot, or retrieval data source.
Primary metric or scoring dimension used to rank results.

permissions.description: Read RAG configuration, corpus metadata, evaluation dataset, sample outputs, and benchmark documentation.

approval_points.description: Confirm evaluation objective, dataset, corpus snapshot, metrics, and sampling plan.
Confirm bounded run count, model calls, retrieval snapshot, and evidence capture before evaluation starts.
Publish evaluation results, report, or benchmark artifacts outside the local workspace.

phases.name: Evaluation Scope
phases.objective: Define target behavior, users, failure modes, retrieval and generation metrics, and acceptance criteria.

phases.name: Data And Metrics
phases.objective: Document question set, references, corpus snapshot, retrieval metrics, answer scoring, and aggregation.

phases.name: Harness
phases.objective: Prepare scoring adapters, sample-level result schema, citation checks, and minimal runnable example.

phases.name: Evaluation Run
phases.objective: Record bounded evaluation results, retrieval hits, generated answers, references, and aggregate metrics.

phases.name: Reliability
phases.objective: Review sample failures, retrieval misses, citation gaps, metric sensitivity, and reproducibility caveats.

phases.name: Report
phases.objective: Package evaluation findings, limitations, sample evidence, and optional publication notes.

required_outputs.description: Evaluation objective, user needs, failure modes, metrics, and acceptance criteria.
Question set, references, corpus snapshot, split mapping, and fingerprint.
Retrieval, answer, citation, aggregation, and threshold definitions.
Scoring adapters, task configuration, result schema, and minimal example notes.
Aggregate retrieval, answer quality, citation, and baseline comparison metrics.
Sample-level questions, retrieved contexts, answers, references, scores, and failure tags.
Reliability, sample failure, citation, and metric sensitivity findings.
Final RAG evaluation report and limitations.

artifacts.description: Evaluation task and scoring implementation or configuration.
Aggregate retrieval, answer, citation, and comparison metrics.

verifiers.description: RAG evaluation objective maps to observable examples, metrics, and acceptance criteria.
Evaluation dataset, references, corpus snapshot, split mapping, and fingerprint are recorded.
Retrieval, answer, citation, aggregation, and threshold metrics are documented.
Scoring code or configuration runs on a minimal example and emits expected fields.
Evaluation metrics include dataset or split, value, run id, and aggregation field.
RAG result is compared against a baseline retriever, prompt, or reference system.
Sample failures, retrieval misses, citation gaps, and metric sensitivity were reviewed.
Final report claims cite aggregate metrics, sample results, corpus metadata, and reliability notes.
